meta.source: CoinGecko (top coins by volume; spot reference, tradeable as perps)

backtest.method: Hourly EMA20/50 trend vs price 24h later, across analysed coins (last 7d)

meta.note: Rules-based technical screen on live market data. NOT financial advice. No signal is 100% accurate; perps use leverage and can lose more than your margin. Paper-trade and verify the hit-rate before risking real money.
